description: Letter from Yaʿīsh b al-Kadīḥī(?) to Sālim b Yūsuf al-Jiyār(?). In Judaeo-Arabic with some Hebrew. Dating: 19th century. The writer asks the addressee to send him with the bearer of the letter the new issue of the jarīda (newspaper? magazine?) that has arrived from Jerusalem, and let him know how much it costs.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
